title: MorePowerGems
description: An unofficial expansion pack for the PowerGems plugin, which adds 10 new unique gems!
body:
# MorePowerGems - an expansion pack for PowerGems This addon adds **10 new gems** to the [PowerGems](https://modrinth.com/plugin/powergems) plugin. Original idea author is [rlxck](https://github.com/rlxck). To contact me or for plugin support, ping @LeonardisG in the official [PowerGems Discord server](https://discord.iseal.dev/) ## Requirements & Compatibility - ⚠️ **You must install:** [SealLib](https://modrinth.com/plugin/seallib) and [PowerGems](https://modrinth.com/plugin/powergems). - **Server:** Works on Spigot and Paper. - **Minecraft:** Version **1.21.11+**. ## Installation 1. Download **SealLib**, **PowerGems**, and this addon. 2. Put all the `.jar` files in your server’s `plugins/` folder. 3. Restart your server. 4. Use the **included resource pack** (it replaces the official PowerGems textures). - Add the pack to `server.properties` or share it with your players so they see the new gem icons. ## Resource Pack - Download the resourcePack [here](https://modrinth.com/collection/Klw3bLg2) --- ## Gems Overview
Affluence Gem - **Right Click:** Gives you Haste II for 60s. - **Shift Click:** Cuts all villager trade prices in half. - **Left Click:** Doubles ores and mob drops for 60s. - **Passive:** Hero of the Village.
Wither Gem - **Right Click:** Take less damage and block projectiles. - **Shift Click:** Big explosion that makes nearby enemies glow and gives them Wither. - **Left Click:** Shoots 3 Wither heads quickly. - **Passive:** Regeneration.
Shulker Gem - **Right Click:** Boosts armor toughness for 20s. - **Shift Click:** Gives Levitation II to nearby players (25 blocks) for 10s, but not you — good for escaping. - **Left Click:** Shoots shulker projectiles that make targets levitate. - **Passive:** Resistance.
Poison Gem - **Right Click:** Shoots a debuff arrow. - 50% chance: Instant Damage II - 50% chance: Poison II - **Shift Click:** Clears all bad effects on you. - **Left Click:** Gives you Regeneration II, and gives target Slow Falling + Slowness. - **Passive:** Regeneration.
Ruin Gem - **Right Click:** Turns nearby terrain (10 blocks) into mossy blocks, giving you Strength. - **Shift Click:** Spawns silverfish that multiply and infest blocks. - **Left Click:** Grapple to walls or ceilings and hold for 2s. - **Passive:** Jump boost.
Amethyst Gem - **Right Click:** Throws an amethyst shard. - **Shift Click:** Shines light on nearby players, and gives them glowing. - **Left Click:** Traps a player in an amethyst cage, dealing non-lethal damage. - **Passive:** Absorption.
Brezze Gem - **Right Click:** Dashes you forward. - **Shift Click:** Summon brezzes. - **Left Click:** Launches wind charges. - **Passive:** No fall damage.
Ender Gem - **Right Click:** Teleports you to a random location nearby. - **Shift Click:** Summon dragon breath. - **Left Click:** Gain Speed II, Strenght II, and hast IV. - **Passive:** Night vision.
Magic Gem - **Right Click:** Summon Evoker Fangs. - **Shift Click:** Spawn loyal Vexes. - **Left Click:** Temporary creative mode flight. - **Passive:** Haste.
Mech Gem - **Right Click:** Creates an explosion. - **Shift Click:** Creates a protective magma box around you. - **Left Click:** Places temporary lava around you. - **Passive:** Fire resistance.
--- ### Notes - The included resource pack **replaces** the official PowerGems textures. Don’t use both at once.
